subtitle: Senior Partner, Data & Analytics -- Enterprise Data Strategy | Production ML | Advisory Practice Foundations
summary_text: Technology executive with 28 years across consulting and enterprise leadership. Founded and ran DMLCo as a 17-year consulting firm with full P&L (peak $4-5M revenue, 12 employees, dozens of client engagements). Spent 14 years as the first CTO in a national 501(c)(3) financial services nonprofit's 45-year history -- owned the data function end-to-end from DBA / SQL Architect origin through enterprise data warehouse maturation through production ML deployment via DataRobot for credit and servicing decisions, all under continuous regulatory scrutiny (HIPAA, PCI-DSS, CARD Act, CFPB across all 50 states). Currently consulting on AI architecture, automation, and implementation -- including a structured evaluation methodology adopted by a national CX consulting firm. Comfortable across all three legs of the technology leadership stool -- people, technology, and budget/ROI -- with executive C-suite advisory and trusted client relationship building as connective tissue.

bullets: Designed an algorithmic AI architecture evaluation framework -- scoring rubric, capability taxonomy, evaluation flow -- adopted by a national CX consulting firm to compare enterprise AI platforms with explicit governance, integration-fit, and capability dimensions.

Provide client-facing advisory on generative and agentic AI architectures, automation, and implementation; translate executive priorities into architectural trade-offs and concrete platform decisions for enterprise environments.
Hands-on AI-assisted engineering daily with Claude and GitHub Copilot; published thinking on AI adoption realities, the automation-vs-AI distinction, and reflexive AI governance practice on LinkedIn.

Directed enterprise technology for a national 501(c)(3) nonprofit in the consumer credit space -- under continuous regulatory scrutiny across all 50 states plus federal regulators including the CFPB, with HIPAA, PCI-DSS, and CARD Act overlays.

Owned the data function end-to-end for 14 years -- DBA / SQL Architect origin, enterprise data warehouse maturation, and production ML deployment via DataRobot for credit and servicing decisions under regulatory governance.

Led cross-functional data-definitions discipline across 12+ executive and operations stakeholders -- agreement on metric calculations, definitions, and the cross-team incentive conflicts that surface around them.
Built Enterprise PMO from scratch; consolidated cross-functional project governance and delivered 25% improvement in project budget and time adherence across a $30-50M annual portfolio.

Owned multi-year platform roadmap for MMI's homegrown ERP/CRM for 8 years across 12+ executive and operations stakeholders; multi-factor prioritization model (ROI x user satisfaction x efficiency x cross-departmental equity) governed sprint-over-sprint decisions across a 45-50 person delivery organization.
Sustained 100% PCI-DSS certification across multiple audit cycles alongside HIPAA and CARD Act compliance; doubled development throughput via Agile transformation (SAFe 10-week to 2-week sprints).
Built and led a 35+ direct (75+ extended) technology team; sustained highest retention and satisfaction in the enterprise across 14 years.
Advanced through progressive roles: DBA / SQL Architect -> IT Manager -> VP IT -> first CTO in the organization's 45+ year history.

Founded and scaled a web development and IT consulting firm over 17 years with full P&L ownership -- $4-5M peak revenue, 12 employees at peak, end-to-end responsibility for finance, client delivery, talent, and operations.

Built and sustained long-term client advisory relationships across dozens of accounts; grew primarily through referral, demonstrating executive trust-building and delivery reliability at professional-services margins.
Architected and operated a proprietary commercial-grade CMS supporting dozens of production sites; direct client engagement across discovery, scope, architecture, build, and ongoing support.

skills.items: Enterprise Data Strategy, DataRobot (Production ML), Data Warehousing, Data Governance, Power BI, Tableau, Cross-Functional Data Definitions
Generative AI, Agentic AI, AI Architecture Evaluation, LLM Platforms, AI Governance
SQL / T-SQL, MSSQL, MySQL, PostgreSQL -- DBA / SQL Architect origin
Microsoft Azure, Azure DevOps, GitHub, CI/CD, Cloud Migration
P&L Ownership, Client Advisory, Practice IP Development, Engagement Management, Voice of Customer
PCI-DSS, HIPAA, CARD Act, CFPB, Multi-State Regulatory, GRC Programs
